title: Question: Improving handling of gated clocks.

features.name: gated clock via continuous assignment from base clock
features.description: Code should include a gated clock signal derived from a base clock through continuous assignment, where the gate enable signal controls the gating

features.name: clock enable updated in base clock domain
features.description: Code should include a clock enable signal that is updated via non-blocking assignment in the base clock domain, where the enable is used to gate that same clock

features.name: dual always blocks with base and gated clocks
features.description: Code should include two always blocks triggered on the base clock and its gated derivative, where the second block reads a register updated in the first block
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) pc <= pc + 1;
always @(posedge gated_clk) res <= pc;
